title: intent-card.v1
description: The distilled intent of a PRD, produced by the 5-Whys intake. Read by every pipeline stage.

root_motivation.description: the customer pain / job-to-be-done, in one paragraph

target.description: build target; agent is the state-machine (LLM-bearing) target

judged.description: true when the AC needs the eval harness (judge/fuzzy), not a bare assert

$comment: At least one MUST-level acceptance criterion is required (nothing to prove otherwise); enforced by pybuilder.intent_card.IntentCard.validate, not expressible in plain JSON Schema.
